name: Alex Rivera

current_profile.summary: Marketing Manager with 10 years in consumer goods. Leads digital campaigns, lifecycle marketing, and experimentation. Strong stakeholder management; comfortable with analytics dashboards, basic SQL queries, and A/B testing. Hands-on GenAI exposure: uses ChatGPT for copy variants and ideation; has not built AI systems or worked with model evaluation.
current_profile.ai_experience: Uses ChatGPT for copy variants and ideation

learning_intent: Wants to pivot into AI product work to future-proof her career and build products that combine customer insight with AI capabilities. Goal: become fluent enough in AI fundamentals to scope use cases, partner effectively with engineering/data science, and ship AI features responsibly.

target_jd.title: AI Product Manager (GenAI features)
requirements: Own AI product roadmap: define vision, requirements, and success metrics
Translate user needs into AI/ML features; collaborate with engineering and data science
Define evaluation criteria, launch experiments, and iterate based on performance
Partner with legal/compliance on privacy, IP, and responsible AI practices

expected_skill_gaps.description: Move from general awareness to practical understanding of LLM fundamentals, limitations, and model selection. Understand privacy/IP/bias basics for GenAI products.
AI product workflow mapping and feedback-loop design for model improvements. Explainability UX and communicating uncertainty to users.
Structured prompting, prompt debugging, and establishing human-in-the-loop review where needed.
Define offline/online evals and release gates; interpret quality dashboards.
Map policies to controls; data retention and minimization in AI features.
